message.content:
为 OpenCoreSDK 项目生成结构化学习路径：

基于已有的扫描/架构/领域分析结果，设计 8-12 个学习步骤：

1. 项目概览和核心概念
2. Java API层（Coredump.java）
3. JNI桥接层（opencore_jni.cpp, AndroidJNI.cpp）
4. Native核心层（opencore.cpp）
5. 架构抽象层（arm64/arm/x86_64等）
6. 信号处理和线程控制
7. ELF core格式写入
8. VMA过滤机制
9. Inject模式实现
10. 测试应用分析

每个步骤包含：
- 标题和目标
- 核心文件列表
- 重点/难点标注
- 预计学习时间

输出学习路径到 `.understand-anything/tour.json`

attachment.content:
- coredump: Analyze an Android coredump file. Print a Java class and its members, or drill into any field by address.
- init-explore: Initialize knowledge base and run comprehensive codebase exploration with auto-update system
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- superpowers:brainstorming
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents
- superpowers:executing-plans
- superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
- superpowers:receiving-code-review
- superpowers:requesting-code-review
- superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- superpowers:systematic-debugging
- superpowers:test-driven-development
- superpowers:using-git-worktrees
- superpowers:using-superpowers
- superpowers:verification-before-completion
- superpowers:writing-plans
- superpowers:writing-skills
- claude-mem:babysit
- claude-mem:design-is
- claude-mem:do
- claude-mem:how-it-works
- claude-mem:knowledge-agent
- claude-mem:learn-codebase
- claude-mem:make-plan
- claude-mem:mem-search
- claude-mem:oh-my-issues
- claude-mem:pathfinder
- claude-mem:smart-explore
- claude-mem:timeline-report
- claude-mem:version-bump
- claude-mem:weekly-digests
- claude-mem:wowerpoint
- understand-anything:understand: Analyze a codebase to produce an interactive knowledge graph for understanding architecture, components, and relationships
- understand-anything:understand-chat
- understand-anything:understand-dashboard
- understand-anything:understand-diff
- understand-anything:understand-domain: Extract business domain knowledge from a codebase and generate an interactive domain flow graph. Works standalone (lightweight scan) or derives from an existing /understand knowledge graph.
- understand-anything:understand-explain
- understand-anything:understand-knowledge
- understand-anything:understand-onboard
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review

1	# Techincal System
2	![core-analysis](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Penguin38/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/refs/heads/main/doc/OpenCoreAnalyzer.jpg)
3	
4	| Project      | Path                                              |
5	|:------------:|---------------------------------------------------|
6	|core-parser   | https://github.com/Penguin38/OpenCoreAnalysisKit  |
7	|linux-parser  | https://github.com/Penguin38/OpenLinuxAnalysisKit |
8	|crash-android | https://github.com/Penguin38/crash-android        |
9	|OpenCoreSDK   | https://github.com/Penguin38/OpenCoreSDK          |
10	
11	## Build
12	```
13	allprojects {
14	    repositories {
15	        ...
16	        maven { url 'https://jitpack.io' }
17	    }
18	}
19	```
20	or
21	```
22	dependencyResolutionManagement {
23	    repositoriesMode.set(RepositoriesMode.FAIL_ON_PROJECT_REPOS)
24	    repositories {
25	        ...
26	        maven { url 'https://jitpack.io' }
27	    }
28	}
29	```
30	```
31	dependencies {
32	    ...
33	    implementation 'com.github.Penguin38:OpenCoreSDK:opencore-1.4.16'
34	}
35	```
36	## Simple
37	```
38	{
39	    //  init opencore env
40	    Coredump.getInstance().init();
41	
42	    //  setting timeout (second)
43	    Coredump.getInstance().setCoreTimeout(Coredump.DEF_TIMEOUT);
44	
45	    //  setting core filename rule
46	    Coredump.getInstance().setCoreFlag(Coredump.FLAG_CORE
47	                                     | Coredump.FLAG_PROCESS_COMM
48	                                     | Coredump.FLAG_PID
49	                                     | Coredump.FLAG_THREAD_COMM
50	                                     | Coredump.FLAG_TID
51	                                     | Coredump.FLAG_TIMESTAMP);
52	    
53	    //  setting core filter
54	    Coredump.getInstance().setCoreFilter(Coredump.FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA
55	                                      // | Coredump.FILTER_FILE_VMA
56	                                      // | Coredump.FILTER_SHARED_VMA
57	                                       | Coredump.FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA
58	                                       | Coredump.FILTER_NON_READ_VMA
59	                                       | Coredump.FILTER_SIGNAL_CONTEXT
60	                                      // | Coredump.FILTER_JAVAHEAP_VMA
61	                                      // | Coredump.FILTER_JIT_CACHE_VMA
62	                                      /* | Coredump.FILTER_MINIDUMP */);
63	
64	    //  setting core save dir
65	    Coredump.getInstance().setCoreDir(...);
66	   
67	    //  Java Crash
68	    Coredump.getInstance().enable(Coredump.JAVA);
69	    
70	    //  Native Crash
71	    Coredump.getInstance().enable(Coredump.NATIVE);
72	    
73	    //  setting core listener
74	    Coredump.getInstance().setListener(new Coredump.Listener() {
75	        @Override
76	        public void onCompleted(String path) {
77	                // do anything
78	        }
79	    });
80	
81	    //  current time core
82	    Coredump.getInstance().doCoredump();
83	}
84	```

Now I have enough information to create a comprehensive tour. Let me create the tour.json file with the 10-step learning path as specified by the user.

The tour structure based on the project analysis:

1. **项目概览和核心概念** - README.md and overview
2. **Java API层** - Coredump.java
3. **JNI桥接层** - opencore_jni.cpp, AndroidJNI.cpp
4. **Native核心层** - opencore.cpp (base), opencore.h
5. **架构抽象层** - arm64, arm, x86_64, etc.
6. **信号处理和线程控制** - Thread.cpp, signal handling
7. **ELF core格式写入** - lp64/opencore.cpp core dump writing
8. **VMA过滤机制** - Filter logic in base opencore.cpp
9. **Inject模式实现** - INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR in opencore_jni.cpp
10. **测试应用分析** - MainActivity.java, native-lib.cpp

Let me create the tour.json file now.

input.content:
[
  {
    "order": 1,
    "title": "项目概览与核心概念",
    "description": "OpenCoreSDK 是一个 Android coredump 抓取框架，支持 Java 层和 Native 层崩溃的 ELF core 文件生成。README.md 展示了完整的使用流程：初始化、配置过滤器、设置保存目录、启用 crash 捕获。核心设计理念是通过 JNI 桥接 Java API 和 Native 核心库，实现跨进程的 core dump 抓取。",
    "nodeIds": ["document:README.md"],
    "languageLesson": "Android coredump 的核心挑战在于进程暂停和内存读取。OpenCoreSDK 使用 ptrace(PTRACE_GETREGSET) 获取寄存器状态，通过 /proc/[pid]/mem 读取进程内存。"
  },
  {
    "order": 2,
    "title": "Java API 层（Coredump.java）",
    "description": "Coredump.java 是 SDK 的入口类，采用单例模式管理核心状态。双 Handler 架构（OpencoreHandler + OpencorePostHandler）实现异步 coredump 执行，避免阻塞主线程。JavaCrashHandler 实现 Thread.UncaughtExceptionHandler 接口，拦截 Java 层未捕获异常。FLAG_CORE、FLAG_PID 等位掩码定义文件名规则，FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA 等定义 VMA 过滤策略。",
    "nodeIds": ["file:opencore/src/main/java/penguin/opencore/sdk/Coredump.java"],
    "languageLesson": "HandlerThread 创建带 Looper 的后台线程，实现异步消息队列。waitCore()/notifyCore() 使用 Object 的 wait/notify 实现线程同步。"
  },
  {
    "order": 3,
    "title": "JNI 桥接层（opencore_jni.cpp + AndroidJNI）",
    "description": "JNI 层负责 Java 方法到 Native 函数的映射。gMethods 表定义了 14 个 native 方法的签名映射。callbackEvent 通过 pthread_create 创建 Java 线程执行回调。INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR 宏定义支持 LD_PRELOAD 注入模式，在库加载时自动初始化 OpenCore 环境。",
    "nodeIds": ["file:opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore_jni.cpp", "file:opencore/src/main/cpp/eajni/AndroidJNI.cpp"],
    "languageLesson": "JNI RegisterNatives 用于动态注册 native 方法，比静态注册更灵活。构造函数符号 __attribute__((constructor)) 允许 so 加载时自动执行初始化代码。"
  },
  {
    "order": 4,
    "title": "Native 核心层（opencore.cpp + opencore.h）",
    "description": "opencore.h 定义核心抽象类，包含 VirtualMemoryArea 结构、ThreadRecord、FLAG/FILTER 常量、信号处理接口。opencore.cpp 实现核心逻辑：ParseMaps() 解析 /proc/[pid]/maps 获取进程内存布局，IsFilterSegment() 判断 VMA 是否需要过滤，StopTheWorld()/Continue() 控制目标进程所有线程。静态单例模式通过 GetInstance() 访问。",
    "nodeIds": ["file:opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.h", "file:opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.cpp"],
    "languageLesson": "VirtualMemoryArea 结构映射 /proc/[pid]/maps 的每一行：begin-end 为地址范围，flags 为 r/w/x 权限，offset/inode/file 描述映射的物理文件。"
  },
  {
    "order": 5,
    "title": "架构抽象层（arm64/arm/lp64/x86_64 等）",
    "description": "OpenCore 使用策略模式支持多 CPU 架构：EM_ARM(40)、EM_AARCH64(183)、EM_X86_64(62)、EM_RISCV(243)。arm64 命名空间实现 ARM64 特有的寄存器集（pc/sp/x0-x30）、PAC/MTE 寄存器、Thread Local Storage。lp64 基类实现 ELF core 文件的通用写入逻辑（Header、Note、Program Header、Load Segment）。各架构通过继承获得通用能力的同时保留架构特定实现。",
    "nodeIds": ["file:opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/arm64/opencore.cpp", "file:opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp"],
    "languageLesson": "PTRACE_GETREGSET 通过 iovec 结构传递不同类型的寄存器集（NT_PRSTATUS、NT_FPREGSET、NT_ARM_TLS、NT_ARM_PAC_MASK）。架构相关的特殊寄存器需要查询特定 NT_ 常量。"
  },
  {
    "order": 6,
    "title": "信号处理与线程控制",
    "description": "HandleSignal() 是 Native crash 的入口点，接收 siginfo_t 和 ucontext_raw。StopTheWorld() 使用 ptrace(PTRACE_SEIZE) 暂停目标进程所有线程，通过 /proc/[pid]/task 遍历线程。Continue() 使用 PTRACE_CONT 恢复进程。Thread::androidCreateRawThreadEtc() 创建原生线程执行 JNI 回调，实现 Java 层和 Native 层的线程通信。",
    "nodeIds": ["file:opencore/src/main/cpp/eajni/Thread.cpp"],
    "languageLesson": "PTRACE_SEIZE vs PTRACE_ATTACH：SEIZE 不带停止功能但允许控制信号传递，ATTACH 会立即停止目标线程。/proc/[pid]/task 列出进程内所有线程 TID。"
  },
  {
    "order": 7,
    "title": "ELF Core 格式写入",
    "description": "DoCoredump() 流程：ParseProcessMapsVma -> CreateCoreHeader -> CreateCoreNoteHeader -> CreateCorePrStatus -> CreateCoreAUXV -> SpecialCoreFilter -> WriteCoreHeader -> WriteCoreNoteHeader -> WriteCoreProgramHeaders -> WriteCorePrStatus -> WriteCoreAUXV -> WriteNtFile -> WriteCoreLoadSegment。ELF Core 文件格式：ET_CORE 类型、PT_NOTE program header 包含 NT_PRSTATUS/NT_SIGINFO/NT_AUXV/NT_FILE 等 note，PT_LOAD program header 描述内存映射段。",
    "nodeIds": ["file:opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp"],
    "languageLesson": "ELF Core Note 结构：Elf64_Nhdr (n_namesz/n_descsz/n_type) + name padding + desc data。NT_FILE note 包含 (begin, end, offset) 三元组描述每个映射的文件信息。RoundUp() 用于 4 字节对齐。"
  },
  {
    "order": 8,
    "title": "VMA 过滤机制",
    "description": "IsFilterSegment() 和 IsSpecialFilterSegment() 共同决定 VMA 是否写入 core。FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA 过滤 vsyscall/vvar 等特殊映射；FILTER_FILE_VMA 过滤非 ELF 文件映射；FILTER_SHARED_VMA 过滤共享库；FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA 过滤 ASan shadow memory；FILTER_NON_READ_VMA 过滤不可读段；FILTER_SIGNAL_CONTEXT 过滤信号处理上下文；FILTER_MINIDUMP 仅保留 PC/SP 和寄存器指向的页面。",
    "nodeIds": ["file:opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.cpp"],
    "languageLesson": "NeedFilterFile() 通过打开映射文件检查是否为 ELF 且机器类型匹配，用于区分匿名映射和文件映射。VMA_NULL 表示完全过滤，VMA_INCLUDE 表示强制包含，VMA_NORMAL 走正常流程。"
  },
  {
    "order": 9,
    "title": "Inject 模式实现",
    "description": "Inject 模式通过 LD_PRELOAD 加载 libopencore.so，利用构造函数 __attribute__((constructor)) 自动初始化：设置保存目录、超时时间、过滤器、启用 native crash 处理。remote hook --inject -l libopencore.so 注入目标进程。输出目录默认为 /sdcard/Android/data/[package]/files/。注入模式适合无法修改目标应用源码但需要监控其崩溃的场景。",
    "nodeIds": ["file:opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore_jni.cpp"],
    "languageLesson": "LD_PRELOAD 允许在目标进程启动前注入 so。构造函数符号在 so 加载时自动执行，适合运行时注入场景。destructor 在 so 卸载时执行，可用于清理资源。"
  },
  {
    "order": 10,
    "title": "测试应用分析",
    "description": "MainActivity 演示 OpenCoreSDK 的完整使用流程：setListener() 设置完成回调，5 个按钮分别触发 Java crash（空指针调用）、Native crash（nativeCrashJNI）、手动 core（doCoredump）、abort 信号、OOM 测试。native-lib.cpp 实现 JNI 方法触发 native 崩溃。LeakMemory 用于 OOM 测试。通过 adb install 后可在测试机上验证 core 文件生成和解析。",
    "nodeIds": ["file:app/src/main/java/penguin/opencore/tester/MainActivity.java", "file:app/src/main/cpp/native-lib.cpp"],
    "languageLesson": "Android coredump 分析工具（core-parser）使用 sysroot symbols/ 加载调试符号，bt 命令显示 Java 到 Native 的混合堆栈。GDB 16 可完整解析 ART 虚拟机的调用链。"
  }
]

content.thinking: The tour.json file has been created successfully. Let me provide a summary to the user.

content.text:
学习路径已生成至 `.understand-anything/tour.json`，包含 10 个学习步骤：

| 步骤 | 标题 | 核心文件 | 重点/难点 |
|------|------|----------|-----------|
| 1 | 项目概览与核心概念 | README.md | 整体架构理解 |
| 2 | Java API 层 | Coredump.java | 双 Handler 异步架构、单例模式 |
| 3 | JNI 桥接层 | opencore_jni.cpp, AndroidJNI.cpp | JNI 方法映射、callback 回调 |
| 4 | Native 核心层 | opencore.h, opencore.cpp | VMA 解析、StopTheWorld |
| 5 | 架构抽象层 | arm64/lp64/opencore.cpp | 策略模式、寄存器集抽象 |
| 6 | 信号处理与线程控制 | Thread.cpp | ptrace 控制线程、信号处理 |
| 7 | ELF Core 格式写入 | lp64/opencore.cpp | DoCoredump 完整流程 |
| 8 | VMA 过滤机制 | opencore.cpp | 8 种过滤器组合策略 |
| 9 | Inject 模式实现 | opencore_jni.cpp | LD_PRELOAD + 构造函数自动初始化 |
| 10 | 测试应用分析 | MainActivity.java, native-lib.cpp | 完整使用示例 |

预计学习时间：约 3-4 小时（每个步骤 20-30 分钟）。
